definition: The ear as a sense faculty within the six sense fields.
notes: The project prefers ear as the plain default. Auditory faculty is acceptable in technical explanation when the faculty-role within the sixfold analysis needs to stay explicit.

context_rules.context: In most source-facing and doctrinal contexts
In analytical prose emphasizing the faculty-role
context_rules.notes: Use when the technical structure needs to be clearer.

example_phrases.pali: sotañca paṭicca sadde ca uppajjati sotaviññāṇaṃ
example_phrases.translation: dependent on the ear and sounds, ear-knowing arises

example_phrases.notes: Shows the term inside āyatana analysis.
